audit.statusSubtitle: Comprehensive Security Audit of Fly Infinity DAO Ecosystem
audit.statusDate: Date: June 21, 2026 | Version: 2.0 | Status: FINAL APPROVED
audit.title: Comprehensive Security Audit Report
audit.summaryText1: After a complete review of all provided files including smart contract codes, front-end files, and auxiliary files, a comprehensive security audit has been conducted on the Fly Infinity DAO ecosystem.
audit.summaryText2: The audit evaluated the ecosystem from two main perspectives: Website Security (Front-End) and Smart Contract Security. All files have been reviewed line by line.
audit.filesText: The following files have been received, reviewed, and analyzed in full:
audit.webA1_1: The site is hosted on GitHub Pages which uses HTTPS by default, encrypting all communication between user browser and server.
audit.webA1_2: Review of dapp.html shows no fetch or XMLHttpRequest requests to external servers for transaction processing.
audit.webQ2: 2. Does the site have access to my wallet?
audit.webA2Title: ❌ NO — The site never has direct access to your wallet
audit.webA2_1: Wallet connection uses the standard eth_requestAccounts method which only provides the public address and never has access to private keys.
audit.webQ3: 3. Can the site endanger my assets?
audit.webA3Title: ❌ NO — No risk to user assets
audit.webA3_1: Review shows the only functions for interacting with the contract are: approveNetworkDAI, approveTokenDAI, becomeOwner, buyFIT, sellFIT, joinGiftContract, and freeGift.
audit.webA3_2: No function exists for automatic token transfers. Every transaction requires manual user confirmation in the wallet.
audit.webQ4: 4. Is my recovery phrase at risk?
audit.webA4Title: ❌ NO — Recovery phrase is never stored or requested
audit.webA4_1: Review of all HTML files shows no input field for recovery phrase (Seed Phrase/Mnemonic).
audit.webA4_2: Only language settings are stored in localStorage. No sensitive information is ever stored.
audit.webQ5: 5. Are there hidden buttons or functions?
audit.webA5Title: ❌ NO — No hidden or backdoor functions exist
audit.webA5_1: All buttons have clear, transparent functionality. All functions require user confirmation in the wallet.
audit.webQ6: 6. Does the site store my information?
audit.webA6_1: Items stored: Language settings and calculation history only.
audit.webA6_2: Items NOT stored: Wallet address, wallet balance, transaction history, private keys, recovery phrase.
audit.contractQ1: 1. Can DAI liquidity be drained from the contract?
audit.contractA1Title: ❌ NO — No liquidity drain access exists
audit.contractA1_1: Review of Fly_Infinity_Token.sol shows the transfer, transferFrom, and approve functions are DISABLED.
audit.contractA1_2: No function exists for direct DAI withdrawal. The only way for DAI to leave is through the Sell function.
audit.contractA2Title: ❌ NO — Founder has no access to user assets
audit.contractA2_1: No modifier named onlyFounder or onlyOwner exists in the token contract.
audit.contractA3_1: The price formula is: Price = Reserve / Total Supply
audit.contractA3_2: Mathematical proof shows price increases on both BUY and SELL transactions:
audit.contractA3_li3: Buy Fee (3%): Increases reserve → price increases
audit.contractA3_li4: Sell Fee (6%): Increases reserve → price increases
audit.contractA4_1: Purchase limits are calculated based on network activity. Starts at 100 DAI and increases with network participation.
audit.daoQ1: How does the DAO voting system work?
audit.daoA1_1: The DAO system implements a 3-day voting period for network members to decide on major changes.
audit.daoA1_li4: If Support > Oppose → Proposal executed with automatic fund migration
audit.daoQ2: What are the security benefits of the DAO?
audit.verdictText: ✅ Fly Infinity DAO is a completely secure, decentralized, and transparent ecosystem.
audit.footerTagline: Fly Infinity — Decentralized. Transparent. Forever Rising.

footer.tagline: Fly Infinity — Decentralized. Transparent. Forever Rising.
